generated.title: GeneratedRadiativeHeatTransfer
generated.description: This is an autogenerated partial class definition of 'RadiativeHeatTransfer'

description*.en: "Radiative Heat Transfer" is proportional to $(T_1^4 - T_2^4)$ and area of the surface, where $T_1$ and $T_2$ are thermodynamic temperatures of two black surfaces, for non totally black surfaces an additional factor less than 1 is needed.

title: RadiativeHeatTransfer
description: "Radiative Heat Transfer" is proportional to $(T_1^4 - T_2^4)$ and area of the surface, where $T_1$ and $T_2$ are thermodynamic temperatures of two black surfaces, for non totally black surfaces an additional factor less than 1 is needed.
